rules.intent: Preserve the intended visual weighting of the palette so the dominant primary tier anchors brand recognition while secondary/tertiary tones remain supporting accents.
rules.rule_text: The brand palette is organized into three tiers: Primary is the dominant tier (Brand Blue #00529b, Sunshine #faa31b, Gold #ffc60a), with Secondary (Sky Blue #358CCB, Deep Blue #003D74, Dark Navy #011E45) and Tertiary (Coral #F26A38, Light Blue #E6F0F9, Golden Sand #FEF1C8, Graphite #212121, White #ffffff) serving as supporting colors. Primary colors should dominate compositions, with secondary and tertiary colors used in a supporting capacity.
